content.speakerText: This one’s for coughs, right? How often do I take it?
content.speakerTextCn: 这个是治咳嗽的吧？一天吃几次？

options.text: Take two tablets at once for faster results.
Take one tablet every 8 hours, max 3 a day.
Take it only when you feel like it.
Take it with alcohol to make it work better.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'Take one tablet every 8 hours, max 3 a day.'，这是标准用药指导，避免过量。选项1建议一次性吃两片，可能造成药物过量；选项3随意服用不符合医嘱；选项4建议与酒精同服，极其危险，可能引发严重副作用。

options.text: No, it’s non-drowsy. You can drive safely.
Yes, it makes you energetic. Take it before work.
It doesn’t affect sleep at all, even if you take it during the day.
It makes you hungry. Eat more after taking it.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'No, it’s non-drowsy. You can drive safely.'，符合非嗜睡类药物的说明。选项2错误地将嗜睡描述为‘有活力’，与常识相悖；选项3虽然说‘不影响睡眠’，但未明确是否会导致困倦，表述模糊且不专业；选项4完全无关，属于干扰项。

content.speakerText: I’ve been taking this for my headache. Is it okay to take it with my other medicine?
content.speakerTextCn: 我一直在吃这个治头痛。能和其他药一起吃吗？

options.text: Yes, mixing medicines is fine — the more, the better.
It’s best to check with your doctor first — some drugs interact dangerously.
Just take them together — you’ll feel better faster.
No, you should never take any medicine for headaches.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'It’s best to check with your doctor first — some drugs interact dangerously.'，强调用药安全和专业咨询的重要性。选项1和3鼓励随意混合药物��可能引发严重药物相互作用；选项4完全否定止痛药使用，不符合医学常识。

content.template: Take one tablet every ___ hours, max 3 a day.
content.hint: 这是常见的服药间隔，避免过量。
content.knowledgePoint: 服药频率表达（every X hours）

content.hint: 描述不会引起困倦的药品常用词。

content.template: ___ crush the tablet — take it whole with water.
content.hint: 提醒不要压碎药片的否定指令。
content.knowledgePoint: 禁止性表达（Don't + 动词原形）

content.speakerText: This one’s for coughs, right? How often do I take it?
content.speakerTextCn: 这个是治咳嗽的吧？一天吃几次？
expectedAnswers: Take one tablet every 8 hours, and don’t take more than three in a day.
Every eight hours — and make sure not to crush it.
Just take one pill every 8 hours, easy as that.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确说明服药频率和最大剂量
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合口语习惯，使用日常表达
关键词覆盖：包含 'every 8 hours', 'max 3 a day', 'don't crush' 等关键信息

expectedAnswers: A little, so avoid driving or using heavy machinery.
No, it’s non-drowsy — safe to take during the day.
Yes, it can make you sleepy, so I’d recommend taking it at night.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确说明是否会引起嗜睡及相应建议
语言准确性：使用正确时态和词汇（e.g., avoid, recommend）
表达自然度：符合真实对话节奏，不生硬
关键词覆盖：包含 'sleepy', 'non-drowsy', 'avoid driving', 'take at night' 等关键表达

content.speakerText: I’m taking this for my allergies. Should I take it with food?
content.speakerTextCn: 我吃这个治过敏，应该饭前吃还是饭后吃？
expectedAnswers: It’s fine to take with or without food — just be consistent.
Take it on an empty stomach for faster absorption.
You can take it after a meal if it upsets your stomach.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰回答是否需要随餐服用
语言准确性：使用正确表达如 'on an empty stomach', 'upsets your stomach'
表达自然度：语气自然，符合药剂师或医生的建议口吻
关键词覆盖：包含 'with food', 'without food', 'empty stomach', 'upsets your stomach' 等核心表达
